title: Eriastrum sapphirinum
taxonomy: Eriastrum sapphirinum, also known as the sapphire fairybell, is a flowering plant. It belongs to the family Polemoniaceae. This plant is native to the western United States, particularly in California and Oregon. Eriastrum sapphirinum is classified as a species within the genus Eriastrum. It is further classified as a member of the tribe Polemonieae within the family Polemoniaceae.
